name: Leftover Lo Mein
recipeIngredient: 1/2 bunch fresh broccoli, cut into 1 inch pieces
2 cups leftover ham, cut into julienne
recipeInstructions:
1. Start cooking the spaghetti according to package directions.
2. In a wok on high heat, stir fry the vegetables in the peanut oil until crisp tender. Do not over cook!
3. Add ham, drained spaghetti, seasonings, and BBQ sauce. Mix gently and heat through.
4. Serve immediately.
